zh.lifeSummary: 當Hans Georg Steck於1657年出生在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯賀瑟內可霍賀格時，他的父親Hans Georg Steck31歲，母親Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl30歲。他於1682年5月10日與Anna Catharina Menges在德國沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1715年1月16日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀武特-斯巴賀享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hans Georg Steck于1657年出生在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯賀瑟內可霍賀格时，他的父亲Hans Georg Steck31岁，母亲Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl30岁。他于1682年5月10日与Anna Catharina Menges在德国沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1715年1月16日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀武特-斯巴賀享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Steck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Armin, Dieter, Ernst, Fritz, Gunther, Otto, Reinhard, Siebert, Urs.
German: from Middle High German stecke ‘stick, rod’, hence a nickname for a tall thin man, or a topographic name from a posted grazing area.

variants.name: Steckley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Markus.
Americanized form of Swiss German Steckli or Stächeli, from Middle High German steckel(in) ‘small stick, cudgel’ (see Steck ).

variants.name: Steckbauer
meanings: German: from Middle High German steckel ‘steep hill’, hence a topographic name for a farmer in such a place. The surname may also be a derivative of Steck 1.

variants.name: Stech
meanings: Polish and Rusyn (from Poland); Czech (Štěch) and Slovak (Štech): from the personal name Stech, Štěch, Štech, pet forms of Polish Stefan, Czech Štěpán, Slovak Štefan, equivalents of Latin Stephanus (see Steven ).
Americanized form of Polish and Rusyn (from Poland)   Stecz  , a cognate of 1 above.
East German: from a pet form of   Steffen  .

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Georg Steck was born in 1657, in Hohberg, Hesseneck, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, his father, Hans Georg Steck, was 31 and his mother, Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl, was 30. He married Anna Catharina Menges on 10 May 1682, in Hebstahl, Erbach, People's State of Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 16 January 1715, in Unter-Sensbach, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Georg Steck est né en 1657, à Hohberg, Hesseneck, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, son père, Hans Georg Steck, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anna Catharina Menges le 10 mai 1682, à Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1715, à Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Januar 1715 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Georg Steck è nato il nel 1657 nel Hohberg, Hesseneck, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, il suo padre, Hans Georg Steck, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anna Catharina Menges il 10 maggio 1682, nel Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1715, nel Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.Unter Sensbach, Beerfelden, Erbach, Star: 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 운터-센스바치
ko.Hebstahl, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈
ko.lifeSummary: Hans Georg Steck(이)가 1657년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 헤센c크 호h버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Georg Steck(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1682년 5월 10일 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈에서 Anna Catharina Menges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1715년 1월 16일 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 운터-센스바치에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Georg Steck nasceu em 1657, em Hohberg, Hesseneck, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Georg Steck, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Catharina Menges em 10 de maio de 1682, em Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Unter Sensbach, Beerfelden, Erbach, Star: унтир-сенсбач, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия
ru.Hebstahl, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: хебстахл, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Georg Steck родился в 1657 г. в местности хохбирг, хессинекк, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия, его отцу по имени Hans Georg Steck было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Catharina Menges 10 мая 1682 г. в местности хебстахл, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1715 г. в местности унтир-сенсбач, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Anna Catharina Menges el 10 de mayo de 1682, en Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1715, en Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, a la edad de 58 años.
